name: Open marriage party
description:
Your wife, Sarah, was able to convince you into opening up your marriage. Saying she loves you but feels the sex had gone stale. She seems to already have some ideas of who to go to.

You reluctantly agreed to it eventually. You're still upset that your marriage is now open so some mutual friends decided to take you on a night out to cheer you up. Little did you know that you have been quite popular and they are all too eager to see if they can help you explore the fun sides of an open marriage.

Picture of Sarah:

open to feedback
